connect.tasktemplate.CfnAbout: Specifies a task template for a Amazon Connect instance.

connect.tasktemplate.ClientToken.Description: A unique, case-sensitive identifier that you provide to ensure the idempotency of the request.

connect.tasktemplate.Constraints.Description: Constraints that are applicable to the fields listed.  The values can be represented in either JSON or YAML format. For an example of the JSON configuration, see *Examples* at the bottom of this page.

connect.tasktemplate.ContactFlowArn.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the flow that runs by default when a task is created by referencing this template. `ContactFlowArn` is not required when there is a field with `fieldType` = `QUICK_CONNECT`.

connect.tasktemplate.Defaults.Description: The default values for fields when a task is created by referencing this template.

connect.tasktemplate.Description.Description: The description of the task template.

connect.tasktemplate.Fields.Description: Fields that are part of the template. A template requires at least one field that has type `Name`.

connect.tasktemplate.InstanceArn.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Amazon Connect instance.

connect.tasktemplate.Name.Description: The name of the task template.

connect.tasktemplate.Status.Description: The status of the task template.

connect.tasktemplate.Tags.Description: The tags used to organize, track, or control access for this resource.
